credentials.title: Create your password
credentials.legalAgeCheckbox: I confirm that I am of legal age to use this platform.
credentials.termsPrefix: I have read and agree to the

otp.title: Enter the code we sent to your phone

profileSetup.repQuestion: Will you represent an artist on ATTO?
profileSetup.repDescription: You are creating this account on behalf of an artist and have their permission to manage and publish their content.
profileSetup.noForMe: No, this account is for me

howItWorks.title: How artist representation works
howItWorks.paragraph:
As a representative, you will manage this account on behalf of the artist.
You will be responsible for publishing content, managing interactions, and handling communications related to the artist's profile.
bullets: You act on behalf of the artist
You must have their explicit consent
All actions are logged for transparency
The artist can revoke representation at any time

consentForm.title: Artist consent is required
consentForm.stateDisclaimer: More states coming soon. Currently only Connecticut is supported.
consentForm.consentCheckbox: I understand and agree that all <bold>consent verification</bold> calls will be recorded for legal and security purposes.
consentForm.lookupFailed: Inmate not found. Please check the number and try again.

whatHappensNext.title: What happens next?
whatHappensNext.verifyConsentParagraph: We will contact the artist directly to verify their consent for you to act as their representative. This is a crucial step to ensure the artist's rights and wishes are respected.
whatHappensNext.howCallsWorkParagraph: All consent verification calls are automatically recorded for legal compliance and your protection. These recordings serve as official documentation of the artist's approval.
callFeatures: Securely stored in a dedicated folder within your profile
Available for you to listen, download or post them to at any time
whatHappensNext.recordingsPrivate: These recordings are private and accessible <bold>only from your account</bold>.

subscription.title: Choose Your Plan
subscription.subtitle: Unlock features that match your goals.
subscription.disclaimer: Cancel anytime. Subscription renews automatically unless canceled before renewal.

bridgeNumber.title: Your Bridge Number
bridgeNumber.subtitle: This is your unique number for connecting with the artist. Share it securely.
bridgeNumber.purchaseFailed: We could not purchase your number. Please try again later.
bridgeNumber.shareMessage:
Your ATTO Bridge Number: {{number}}

Use this number to connect with your artist.
bridgeNumber.contactPermissionMessage: Allow access to Contacts to save the bridge number.
bridgeNumber.noteSecure: Keep this number secure. The artist will need it to verify and establish the connection.
bridgeNumber.noteOtp: An OTP will be sent to the inmate to verify your representation before the bridge call can be established.
